name: Notion
purpose: Create and update RUH AI ticket-grouped Mixpanel event specifications for review.
reads: existing ticket-specific documentation by Linear ticket ID
configured parent page or database metadata
writes: event spec pages or database records
PR URL and test summary updates after GitHub PR creation
requirements: Use Linear ticket ID as idempotency key.
Include Linear URL, event specs, typed properties, trigger points, implementation notes, uncertainty notes, and PR links.
Support database target or parent page target.
